lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You seem to like playing with danger, there.

lines.speaker: 'No fingers'
lines.text: They don't call me 'No-fingers' for nothing!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, correct me if I'm wrong, but you seem to have all your fingers.

lines.speaker: 'No fingers'
lines.text: It may seem that way mate, but I think you'll find I don't have any.

lines.speaker: 'No fingers'
lines.text: These not be fingers. These 'ere be wooden fingers.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's not possible, how could you move them?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, well I think I'd better be going now.

lines.speaker: 'No fingers'
lines.text: Don't suppose you've seen any boots around here? Size nine, steel toed, brown leather...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, not at all. I'd best be going. Have a nice day. Bye!
